opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was just carrying groceries and got this crushing weight on my chest, and it terrifies me because my dad died of a heart attack at my age.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The chest tightness came on while I was carrying groceries and only partly eased off after I sat down — I've still got a dull ache and I'm scared because of my dad.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on suddenly today while carrying groceries; I've actually had milder tight feelings on and off for about two weeks
symptom_narrative.duration: the bad episode was about 20 minutes, and there's still a dull ache now
symptom_narrative.character: a crushing, heavy, squeezing weight on the middle of my chest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst was severe and frightening; now it's a lingering dull ache
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of my chest, and it spread up into my left jaw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes on when I exert myself, like carrying or hurrying
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down and resting took the edge off after about 20 minutes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: physical effort — it started while I was lifting the shopping
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I felt really wiped out and tired with it, and very anxious
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: a few milder tight episodes over the last couple of weeks, but nothing like today
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm normally really fit and active, but right now I'm just sitting still, frightened to move

family_history_as_reported.narrative: My dad died of a heart attack when he was about my age. There's a lot of really high cholesterol in my family and a few early heart attacks.

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: I eat pretty healthily and I go to the gym — I've got my gym bag and meal prep right here
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very distressed about the family history of dying young from heart problems; spouse is here with me

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff during acute distress
home fingertip oximeter; a normal oxygen level does not rule out a heart problem
